zh.Anlaby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingd: 英國英格蘭越可爾安拉比
zh.Of Anlaby, Yorks, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾安拉比
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Legard於1326年出生在英國越可爾安拉比時，他的父親William Legard32歲，母親Margaret Moyne27歲。他於大約1387年與Ellen Clyffe結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Anlaby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingd: 英国英格兰越可爾安拉比
zh-hans.Of Anlaby, Yorks, England: 英国英格兰越可爾安拉比
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Legard于1326年出生在英国越可爾安拉比时，他的父亲William Legard32岁，母亲Margaret Moyne27岁。他于大约1387年与Ellen Clyffe结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Legard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): from the Middle English male or female personal name Legard (Old French Legard, from ancient Germanic Leudgard, Liudgard, or its female equivalent Leudgarda, Liudgarda). These derive from the elements leud ‘people’ + gard ‘protective enclosure, yard’.
French: metonymic occupational name for a gardener or status name for someone who owned garden, a variant of Gard , with fused masculine definite article le. Compare also Alligood .

variants.name: Leggett
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name from Middle English legat, legate ‘delegate, ambassador, deputy’ (Old French legat), Latin legatus ‘one who is appointed or ordained’.
English: variant of   Legard  , especially in Sussex, perhaps through confusion of the two names.

variants.name: Gard
meanings: English (southern): occupational name from Middle English gard(e), guard(e) ‘care, custody, protection’ (Old French garde ‘guard, watchman’), for a member of a town watch or troop of guards.
Norwegian (also Gård): habitational name from any of the two farmsteads so named in Rogaland, from Old Norse garthr ‘farm’.
Swedish (Gård): topographic or ornamental name from gård ‘farm’.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Legard was born in 1326, in Anlaby, Yorkshire, England, his father, William Legard, was 32 and his mother, Margaret Moyne, was 27. He married Ellen Clyffe about 1387. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Legard est né en 1326, à Anlaby, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Legard, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margaret Moyne, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Ellen Clyffe environ 1387. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Legard 1326 in Anlaby, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Legard 32 und seine Mutter Margaret Moyne 27. Er hat um 1387 Ellen Clyffe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Legard è nato il nel 1326 nel Anlaby, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, William Legard, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Moyne, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Ellen Clyffe circa 1387. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: John Legardが1326年にイギリスヨークシュアイアアンラビーで生まれた時，父William Legardは32歳，母Margaret Moyneは27歳であった。約1387年にEllen Clyffeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: John Legard(이)가 1326년 영국 요르크실르 아라비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Legard(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Moyne(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1387년 Ellen Clyffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

mn.Anlaby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingd: Anlaby, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Of Anlaby, Yorks, England: Anlaby, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Legard nasceu em 1326, em Anlaby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Legard, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Moyne, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellen Clyffe aproximadamente 1387. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Legard родился в 1326 г. в местности анлаби, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Legard было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Moyne, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen Clyffe около 1387 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Legard nació en 1326, en Anlaby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Legard, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Margaret Moyne, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Ellen Clyffe aproximadamente 1387. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas.
